description_for_model: Provides AI-powered CRM capabilities: draft sales emails, summarise support cases, retrieve lead scores, and get next-best-action recommendations. Always confirm the tenant context is set before calling these APIs.
description_for_human: AI tools for your CRM: email drafts, case summaries, lead scores and sales recommendations.

functions.name: DraftEmail
functions.description: Generate a professional email draft for a lead or customer

functions.name: SummariseCase
functions.description: Summarise a support case including issue and resolution

functions.name: SendTeamsNotification
functions.description: Send an AI-composed Teams Adaptive Card notification

functions.name: AnalyseSentiment
functions.description: Analyse the sentiment of a customer comment

functions.name: ScoreLead
functions.description: Score a sales lead from 0-100 with rationale

functions.name: NextBestAction
functions.description: Recommend the next best action for a lead or opportunity

functions.name: QueryKnowledge
functions.description: Answer CRM questions using documentation and past resolutions

functions.name: ForecastPipeline
functions.description: Predict quarterly pipeline revenue and win probability

functions.name: PredictChurn
functions.description: Analyse account health and predict churn risk
